allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem src -Recurse -File | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\', ''\) }; Get-ChildItem public -Recurse -File | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\', ''\) })

PowerShell(Test-Path "d:\\Productive time\\3d-portfolio\\3d-portfolio\\src\\data\\profile.ts"; Get-ChildItem "d:\\Productive time\\3d-portfolio\\3d-portfolio\\src" -Recurse -File | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\('d:\\Productive time\\3d-portfolio\\3d-portfolio\\', ''\) } | Select-Object -First 60; git -C "d:\\Productive time\\3d-portfolio\\3d-portfolio" log --oneline -5)
PowerShell(npx eslint . -f unix | Out-File "$env:TEMP\\lint_before.txt" -Encoding utf8; \(Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\lint_before.txt" | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; git stash pop)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/" -UseBasicParsing; $r.StatusCode; $r.Content | Select-String "Pranto" | Select-Object -First 2; $pdf = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/downloads/Pranto_Resume.pdf" -UseBasicParsing -Method Head; $pdf.StatusCode)

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess; $p.Id; $p.ProcessName; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($conn.OwningProcess\)"\).CommandLine } else { "nothing listening" })

PowerShell($edge = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $edge\)\) { $edge = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe" }; Test-Path $edge; $tmp = "$env:TEMP\\proj_shots"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $tmp | Out-Null; & $edge --headless=new --disable-gpu --screenshot="$tmp\\polymtd.png" --window-size=1600,1000 --hide-scrollbars --virtual-time-budget=8000 "https://pinkowojak.github.io/PolyMTD-Keccak-Variants/" 2>$null; Start-Sleep 2; Get-ChildItem $tmp)

PowerShell($edge = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $edge\)\) { $edge = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe" }; $tmp = "$env:TEMP\\proj_shots"; & $edge --headless=new --disable-gpu --screenshot="$tmp\\prng.png" --window-size=1600,1000 --hide-scrollbars --virtual-time-budget=8000 "https://pinkowojak.github.io/PRNG-Visualizer/" 2>$null; Start-Sleep 1; & $edge --headless=new --disable-gpu --screenshot="$tmp\\skincare.png" --window-size=1600,1000 --hide-scrollbars --virtual-time-budget=8000 "https://pinkowojak.github.io/skincare-tracker/" 2>$null; Start-Sleep 1; Get-ChildItem $tmp)

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\proj_shots"; $dests = @\("public\\images", "d:\\Productive time\\3d-portfolio\\3d-portfolio\\public\\images"\); foreach \($d in $dests\) { Copy-Item "$tmp\\polymtd.png" "$d\\polymtd.png" -Force; Copy-Item "$tmp\\prng.png" "$d\\prng-visualizer.png" -Force; Copy-Item "$tmp\\skincare.png" "$d\\skincare-tracker.png" -Force }; Get-ChildItem "public\\images\\polymtd.png", "public\\images\\prng-visualizer.png", "public\\images\\skincare-tracker.png" | Select-Object Name, Length)

PowerShell($ref = "d:\\Productive time\\3d-portfolio\\Reference\\3d-portfolio\\ref\\3d-portfolio"; git diff --no-index --stat "$ref\\src\\components\\Work.tsx" "src\\components\\Work.tsx"; "exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; git diff --no-index --stat "$ref\\src\\components\\styles\\Work.css" "src\\components\\styles\\Work.css"; "exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; git diff --no-index --stat "$ref\\src\\components\\WorkImage.tsx" "src\\components\\WorkImage.tsx"; "exit: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false; "killed PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { "no listener" })

PowerShell($ref = "d:\\Productive time\\3d-portfolio\\Reference\\3d-portfolio\\ref\\3d-portfolio"; git diff --no-index "$ref\\src\\components\\Work.tsx" "src\\components\\Work.tsx" | Select-String '^[+-]' | Select-String -NotMatch '^[+-]{3}' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })

PowerShell($ref = "d:\\Productive time\\3d-portfolio\\Reference\\3d-portfolio\\ref\\3d-portfolio"; "== HASHES \(working vs ref\) =="; foreach \($f in @\("src\\components\\WorkImage.tsx", "src\\components\\styles\\Work.css", "src\\components\\Work.tsx"\)\) { $a = \(Get-FileHash $f -Algorithm SHA256\).Hash; $b = \(Get-FileHash "$ref\\$f" -Algorithm SHA256\).Hash; $match = if \($a -eq $b\) { "IDENTICAL" } else { "DIFFERS" }; "$f : $match" }; "== ALL LISTENING NODE/VITE PORTS =="; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | ForEach-Object { try { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction Stop; if \($p.ProcessName -match 'node|vite'\) { "$\($_.LocalAddress\):$\($_.LocalPort\) PID=$\($p.Id\)" } } catch {} } | Sort-Object -Unique)

PowerShell($d = "$env:TEMP\\workdiag"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $d | Out-Null; Set-Location $d; npm init -y | Out-Null; npm install puppeteer-core 2>$null | Select-Object -Last 1; Test-Path "$d\\node_modules\\puppeteer-core"; Set-Location "d:\\Productive time\\3d-portfolio\\3d-portfolio\\Reference\\3d-portfolio")

PowerShell($src = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\workdiag\\diag5.js" -Raw; $src = $src.Replace\("if \(top >= -50 && top <= 240\) break;", "if \(top >= -100 && top <= 280\) break;"\).Replace\("for \(let k = 0; k < 30; k++\)", "for \(let k = 0; k < 60; k++\)"\).Replace\("window.scrollBy\(0, d\), top < -50 ? -250 : 100", "window.scrollBy\(0, d\), top < -100 ? -200 : 60"\).Replace\('setTimeout\(r, 300\)\)', 'setTimeout\(r, 500\)\)'\); Set-Content "$env:TEMP\\workdiag\\diag6.js" $src -Encoding utf8; Set-Location "$env:TEMP\\workdiag"; node diag6.js 2>$null; Set-Location "d:\\Productive time\\3d-portfolio\\3d-portfolio\\Reference\\3d-portfolio")
